use_cases: Display user identity and role in SaaS dashboards
Show user engagement metrics on hover in community platforms
Present team member profiles in collaboration tools
Render contact cards in CRM or directory applications
ai_summary: A minimalist user profile card component featuring a profile avatar, name, and title with an expandable stats panel revealed on hover. Built with Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion, it includes smooth spring-based animations with staggered reveals for profile completion, activity level, and reputation metrics. Supports dark/light mode theming and is designed for SaaS applications, social platforms, and team directories.
